description_long: This is a two-story residential house set on a rectangular plot surrounded by a dense border of trees, providing privacy and a natural aesthetic. The house features a prominent gable roof in dark gray, with symmetrical window placement on the front facade and a central entryway accessed by a set of steps. The front includes a covered porch supported by columns, adding to its inviting appearance. The exterior walls are rendered in a light color, contrasting with the darker roof and window frames. The property is bordered by a manicured lawn, and the trees form a natural barrier on all sides. The overall design suggests a blend of Colonial and Craftsman influences, with a focus on symmetry and classic residential elements.
description: A two-story house with a dark gable roof, symmetrical windows, and a columned front porch, surrounded by dense trees and a manicured lawn.
description_view_0: Front view showing the main entryway with steps, a covered porch, and symmetrical windows, framed by trees.
description_view_1: Side/rear view dominated by the tree border, with the house roof partially visible and minimal architectural details exposed.
description_view_2: Rear view with the back of the house mostly obscured by trees, only the roof and some upper windows are visible.
description_view_3: Opposite side/rear view, again showing the dense tree border and the house roof, with little detail of the house facade.
attribute_entryway_design: Central entry with steps, covered porch, and supporting columns
